regression_check.evidence: git diff --unified=0 68b73c6..dd2cb39 -- tests shows only import deletions and TC-2.6 label renames; no expect() assertion removals were found.

scope_check.notes: Changed files stay within the targeted docs, environment/history/hydration-plan/provider-kind codepaths, related Convex persistence, and matching tests/fixtures. Excluded items 15, 16, and 18 were not touched.

notes: Items 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, and 13 add non-tautological assertions over real behavior.
Item 11's test is reducer-only and would not fail if checkpoint publication of materials regressed.
The integration chain test includes one tautological length check, but the adjacent uniqueness assertion is meaningful.

nonblocking_warnings.warning: Add a stronger test that drives a real checkpoint/live-publication sequence; the current reducer-only test does not verify checkpoint-triggered materials publication.
